extensions.name: OpenConditions — Road & Traffic Conditions
extensions.summary: Live road & traffic conditions overlay (DATEX II / Open511 / WZDx) plus closure-aware routing.
extensions.description: Ingests live road and traffic conditions as data from 30+ public feeds (DATEX II, OpenLR, Open511, WZDx) into PostGIS, renders them as a map overlay, and feeds Valhalla road-closure avoidance. Ships the ingestion service; the road-conditions overlay is built into OpenMapX.
extensions.author: OpenConditions Contributors
